name: Men's Flat Top Sunglasses - Original Use™ Blue
description:
Shatter-resistant sunglasses with UV protection against sun exposure. Designed with brown tortoise-print plastic arms, a flat top plastic rim in solid blue and a thin metal rim on the bottom. Gold-color lenses and hinged temples.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.

Original Use™: Always the next evolution.
